acceptance_criteria_completed: AC-1: Chat agent /add-text command appends text when executed
AC-2: + button opens import modal when clicked in articles view
AC-3: Import modal appends text to selected article with source tracking
AC-4: Markdown formatting renders after text import

imports_table.description: New table for tracking import sources and metadata

appendText_mutation.description: Appends text to existing documents with double newline separator

createImport_mutation.description: Creates import record and appends text with rate limiting

add_text_command.description: Chat command for importing text via chat interface

ArticleImportModal_component.description: Modal for selecting article and pasting text to import

patterns_followed.source_tracking: All imports track source attribution in imports table
patterns_followed.rate_limiting: Import actions limited to 10/hour via MAX_IMPORTS_PER_HOUR constant
patterns_followed.markdown_preservation: Text stored as-is without sanitization, preserving markdown formatting
patterns_followed.append_only: Text appended with double newline separator, never replaced
